title: Routes of infection
body_html:
Route of InfectionExample Pathogens
Droplet spreadInfluenza virus, Neisseria meningitidis, Respiratory syncytial virus (RSV), Streptococcus pyogenes, Bordetella pertussis
Faecal–oralSalmonella spp., Norovirus, Shigella spp., Escherichia coli (ETEC/EHEC), Hepatitis A virus, Rotavirus
Invasion of intact skinLeptospira spp., Schistosoma spp., Hookworm (via larvae), Strongyloides stercoralis
Invasion of breached skinStaphylococcus epidermidis, Staphylococcus aureus, Pseudomonas aeruginosa, Clostridium tetani
Sexual intercourseHIV, Neisseria gonorrhoeae, Chlamydia trachomatis, Treponema pallidum (syphilis), Herpes simplex virus (HSV), Human papillomavirus (HPV)
4
300
Microbiology
